mapper.select: SELECT * FROM thuchiencongdoan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_cong_doan = #{maCongDoan}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thuchiencongdoan (ma_nv, ma_cong_doan, ngay_bat_dau, ngay_ket_thuc, dung_han, ghi_chu) VALUES (#{maNv}, #{maCongDoan}, #{ngayBatDau}, #{ngayKetThuc}, #{dungHan}, #{ghiChu})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM thuchiencongdoan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_cong_doan = #{maCongDoan}
